creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> … main-n263900-cd9da8d072e4-dirty … 

That is, <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?qt=range&q=cd9da8d072e4>, and the dirt (if relevant) is <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D40045> (⚙ D40045 ule: queue partial slice users on tdq_realtime and enable more preemption). 

----

> … /usr/src/sys/vm/vm_page.c:1183

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/c7aebda8a14a3bb94bb038df338549ccde5b56ea> (2013-08-09), 

>> The soft and hard busy mechanism rely on the vm object lock to work.

----

From core.txt.8 (attached, comment 0):
